response.step_by_step_log: 1. Analyzed video content to identify segments based on visual cues and speaker activity. 2. Determined that the entire video consists of announcements and a closing segment. 3. Confirmed there is no vocal music performance in the video; only speech and background instrumental music. 4. Set 'contains_vocal_music' to false for all segments in accordance with the findings.
response.global_summary: This video is a live stream recording of Hoshimachi Suisei announcing merchandise, a live tour, and a new song titled 'Primadonna'. The video consists of several segments of her speaking to the camera or showing on-screen graphics for the announcements, followed by a closing screen with instrumental music. No vocal song performances occur in this video.

scenes.description: Hoshimachi Suisei introduces the stream and the topic of her upcoming birthday and 8th anniversary.
Hoshimachi Suisei presents the item list for her birthday and 8th-anniversary merchandise.
Hoshimachi Suisei announces the release of the Blu-ray for her 'Hoshimachi Suisei Live Tour 2024 Spectrum of Nova' and the 'Super Nova' concert.
Hoshimachi Suisei announces her new song 'Primadonna', sharing details about the composer and release time.
Hoshimachi Suisei concludes the stream with a closing message and thank you.
Closing screen displaying a message from Hoshimachi Suisei with instrumental music playing in the background.
